'''Kuar''' was a [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] world of flat, rocky, dusty plains.

==Description==
Kuar was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kuar system/Legends|Kuar system]], [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] a single [[Star/Legends|star]].<ref name="DA" /> The [[Koros Trunk Line/Legends|Koros Trunk Line]] passed by Kuar between [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]] and [[Foerost/Legends|Foerost]].<ref name="BATDC" /> The native [[Kuaran]]s built cites, towns and villages throughout the world,<ref name="DA" /> almost always underground.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

Native fauna included [[Combat arachnid/Legends|combat arachnids]], and six-legged yellow reptiles with prehensile tails.<ref name="DA" />

==History==
Kuar was [[Battle of Kuar|conquered]] in [[4002 BBY]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]],<ref name="TGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> who wiped out most of the indigenous Kuarans<ref name="SWI80" /> and used the ruined, underground cities as staging grounds for their attack upon the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> To resolve the conflict, [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] challenged [[Mandalore the Indomitable]] to a duel. On the [[Plains of Harkul]], Qel-Droma [[Duel on Kuar|defeated]] the Mandalorian leader, winning his loyalty.<ref name="TOTJ" /> The Mandalorians only used the planet briefly after conquering it, and the structures were abandoned for hundreds, if not thousands, of years.<ref name="DA" />

During the [[Diversity Alliance]] Crisis, [[Bornan Thul]] met with the scavenger [[Fonterrat]] on Kuar, on behalf of the Alliance leader, [[Nolaa Tarkona]].<ref name="TEP">''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague]]''</ref> [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] later arrived on the planet while trying to find [[Raynar Thul]]'s father.<ref name="DA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
